rows.label: qev065304_MSG0001
rows.name:
Today's training was fulfilling too!
Hehe! No matter what kind of native creatures attack,
I'll protect this city with my strength![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Oh, do you have a job request?
If you're ever in trouble, just tell me anything.
I'll resolve everything with these thoroughly trained muscles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask him what kind of personality he has.

rows.label: qev065304_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that Lyvia wants to meet him.

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0003
qev065304_MSG0004
rows.name:
No matter what kind of native creatures attack,
I'll repel them head-on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Unfortunately, women are the only thing I'm bad at handling,
but other than that, I have no enemies, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0006
rows.name:
E-Eeeeeeeeeh!
There's a woman who wants to meet me!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0007
rows.name:
...No, of course I want to meet her, but...
What the heck am I supposed to talk about when we meet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0008
rows.name: ...I can just think about that later?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0009
rows.name:
Damn it! I got it!
I'll go see this weirdo, even if it means preparing to crash and burn![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0010
rows.name:
S-Such a cute girl is into me...?
No, I'm not being tricked or something, am I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065304_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm really bad at handling women, but...
I can talk normally with Lyvia.
How do I put it... she's a mysterious girl.[ST:wait ]
